productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Stripes Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Turquoise blue and white striped T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, graphic print on the front and brand tab attached to the left hem on the front Fitting Regular   Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little one ready for the outdoors with this turquoise blue and white striped T-shirt from palm tree. The graphic lettering of the word - Moscow and the brand name gives this T-shirt a dose of brand appeal. Team this with jeans and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
